Welcome to DBGT Network Version 6.0("v5 upgrade"). The DBGT Network webmaster & staff are dedicated to offer you the best Dragon Ball content from all over the net. Many features of the site are always being improved to please the visitor. If you don't like something on this site don't hesitate to tell us what it is. This site has grown to be one of the most interactive sites on the net today. Enjoy your visit!

All news posts reported here are strictly for dbgt.com only. You may post any news on your site only with a source link back to ours. All news reported here is sourced if obtained elsewhere.

News Options [ Less News - More News ]

- Frank having CPU problems
Frank has been having problems with his CPU, check the post by his freind from http://www.owwfmedia.com :


***ATTETION VISITORS*** This is frank"s friend, the owner of Owwfmedia.com. I am here to let you know that frank is having trouble with his cpu right now and he knows that the server is too slow. Frank will try to fix that problem as soon as he gets his computer fixed. So for time being please be patient until he gets things worked out. Thanks.

Thank you for passing along the message.

Register - View Comments (4)
 Posted: Tuesday, July 16, 2002 » Deano
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Kmart
This probably isn't that important to you guys but I thought i'd let you know. Apparently, Kmart will now be supplying DBZ products. They will be marketing the latest products but it's not as if you can't get it anywhere else. Also, I would like to know if there are any asp experts out there or at least someone who has a good grasp of it. If you are, contact me on aim. My screen name is ElusiveJake. Peace!

Register - View Comments (8)
 Posted: Tuesday, July 16, 2002 » Scouter
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Eh, read on...
Yeah I am aware that some of the downloads are not up, that is mostly my fault. On Sunday I was working on a new layout but I got hungry so I left my cpu uploading while I grabbed a snack. When I came back from getting a snack I smelled plastic burning, to my surprise it was like 4th of July all over again inside my cpu pop after pop. It seems my power supply just couldn't handle anymore usage and it blew up. I had to wait until today to buy some parts to repair it. So i'm working on getting everything done, including that updated tutorial.

Register - View Comments (19)
 Posted: Monday, July 15, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- New Tutorial Is Ready..
Hey whats up dbgt fans,Long time no see ehh.Anyway while i was gone for a bit i made a new tutorial.The Tutorial is an updated tutorial of the quick editor tutorial.But this tutorial has pictures and is bit more in-depth.Ive sent the file to frank and hopefully he'll have the tutorial up today. By the way nice work on the new layout frank, looks great!....

Register - View Comments (1)
 Posted: Monday, July 15, 2002 » GogetaXl
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Why are we down?
Sorry fRaNk if you wanted to open dbgt, but i cant see why we are down... ive fixed all the bugs on the layout, you sorted the cgi, we have fixed all the member script bugs.

I'll put it back online, if you feel you need to take it back down do it, but i think people are just itching to see it.

You can sign up to the members script by clicking register below this post. If you notice any bugs email me.

Register - View Comments (21)
 Posted: Sunday, July 14, 2002 » Deano
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Forum is back..
No, not our original one but our partnered one. Anime Forumz is now back and is ready for people to start registering. I'll try to be there frequently so all you people trying to contact me here's your chance. We will soon have a section just for dbgt.com so you can ask us about the site as well. That's all for now..

Register - View Comments (1)
 Posted: Thursday, July 11, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Update...
The community section has been updated and a new Site of the Moment has been placed. As for the members section and the layout upgrade, progess is coming along well. We had a few bugs but most if not all have been worked out, it everything goes well everything should be up and running in less than a weeks time. One last thing, new PHP tutorial has just been posted.

Register - View Comments (1)
 Posted: Wednesday, July 10, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- More Texas News
Well it is apparent that Texas gets to meet all these stars. It would be nice if they came East :-). Anyways, here some stars that will be appearing at the Irving Public Library, Kyle Hebert, voice of Teenage Gohan; Chris Rager, voice of Hercule; Josh Martin, voice of Majin Buu; Sonny Strait, voice of Krillin; and Sean Teague, voice of Koenma. The stars will host a voice acting discussion, sign autographs, and judge an art contest for the kids that attend. There will also be an animation cel demonstration. Here's the address for all you Texans, 801 W. Irving Blvd. Irving, TX 75060 or you can call at (972) 721-2458.

Register - View Comments (0)
 Posted: Monday, July 08, 2002 » Scouter
